ModMetaData.name: RimBridgeServer
ModMetaData.author: Andreas Pardeike
ModMetaData.description:
Turn a running RimWorld session into a live automation bridge.
RimBridgeServer is a developer-facing mod for external tools, test harnesses, and AI agents. It exposes a stable tool surface from the real game so mods can be debugged, driven, and validated against actual RimWorld state instead of a simulation.
IN PRACTICE YOU CAN
- inspect live game, map, camera, selection, notification, and UI state - drive debug actions, main tabs, Architect designators, saves, and screenshots - change mod settings and mod load order - run JSON or lowered Lua automation scripts - let third-party mods expose their own bridge tools through RimBridgeServer.Annotations
RECOMMENDED SETUP
Use GABS to start RimWorld, discover the live bridge surface, and connect your automation client without manually managing ports or tokens.
DIRECT MODE
Standalone direct mode still works. Start RimWorld normally, read the bridge startup lines from the RimWorld log, and connect your client directly to the advertised port and token.
INSTALLATION
1. Download the latest release from GitHub 2. Unzip the RimBridgeServer folder into RimWorld's Mods directory 3. Enable RimBridgeServer in RimWorld 4. Prefer GABS when you want AI or harness-driven control
FEEDBACK
GitHub releases, issues, and docs: https://github.com/pardeike/RimBridgeServer
GABS: https://github.com/pardeike/GABS
LICENSE
MIT
